message:
refactor(render): minor diff algorithm and re-export adjustments

diff.rs:
- Adjust diff algorithm edge cases for inline auto mode compatibility
- Improve handling of height-change scenarios in virtual terminal diff

lib.rs (ftui crate root):
- Update public re-exports to expose new runtime configuration types
- Ensure InlineAutoRemeasureConfig is accessible from top-level crate

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
